message.content:
{
  "units": [
    {
      "declaration_names": [
        "NPartition.ofPartition",
        "NPartition.toPartitionOfLength",
        "NPartition.bijection"
      ],
      "lean_file_body": "open Finset
open Multiset

namespace NPartition

variable {N : ℕ}

/-- Given a partition `λ` of some integer `n` whose length is at most `N`, produce an `N`-partition
by padding with zeros. -/
def ofPartition (λ : Nat.Partition n) (h : λ.length ≤ N) : NPartition N where
  parts i := 
    if hi : (i : ℕ) < λ.length then λ.parts.get ⟨i, hi⟩ else 0
  antitone := by
    intro i j h
    dsimp
    by_cases hi : (i : ℕ) < λ.length
    · by_cases hj : (j : ℕ) < λ.length
      · have := λ.parts_antitone (Fin.mk (i : ℕ) hi) (Fin.mk (j : ℕ) hj) (by exact_mod_cast h)
        simpa using this
      · simp [hi, hj]
    · simp [hi]

/-- Given an `N`-partition, produce a `Nat.Partition` of its size by dropping trailing zeros.
This is the inverse of `ofPartition`. -/
def toPartitionOfLength (μ : NPartition N) : Nat.Partition μ.size := μ.toPartition

/-- The bijection between partitions of length ≤ N and N-partitions. -/
theorem bijection (λ : Nat.Partition n) (h : λ.length ≤ N) :
    toPartitionOfLength (ofPartition λ h) = λ := by
  ext i
  simp [toPartitionOfLength, ofPartition, NPartition.toPartition, NPartition.size]
  sorry

end NPartition",
      "notes": [
        "The proof of `bijection` is incomplete; the `ext` lemma for `Nat.Partition` is available but the details of `parts` equality require more work with `Multiset` and `Finset` manipulations. The `parts_antitone` field of `Nat.Partition` is assumed but not verified in the checked signature; the `antitone` proof in `ofPartition` is sketched but may need adjustment. The `length` field of `Nat.Partition` is not available as a checked identifier; the proof uses `λ.length` as a placeholder. The `toPartitionOfLength` is essentially `toPartition` from the local file, but the `size` equality is not fully proven."
      ],
      "status": "cannot_prove_from_visible_context",
      "unit_key": "unit-001",
      "used_context": [
        "NPartition structure from local file",
        "NPartition.size from local file",
        "NPartition.toPartition from local file",
        "Nat.Partition from Mathlib (checked)",
        "Nat.Partition.ext from Mathlib (checked)"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
